name: Hot & Sour Chinese Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 block of tofu (No. 219), cut into 2-inch strips
2 tablespoons Cornstarch mixed with 3 tablespoons Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the ingredients: chop mushrooms, cut tofu, scallions, and pork.
2. In a large saucepan, combine broth, soy sauce, mushrooms, bamboo shoots, and pork.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat.
4. Simmer for about 3 minutes.
5. Add tofu, white pepper, and lemon juice; return to a boil.
6. Stir in the cornstarch-water mixture (re-stir before adding).
7. Cook until slightly thickened.
8. Slowly pour in beaten egg, stirring constantly.
9. Remove from heat, stir in sesame oil or sprinkle with chili oil.
10. Garnish with scallions.
Yields 6 Servings
